selected_important_turn.text: No. I won't part with any firewood because I can't stand being cold, and you can have 2 foods if you have a larger group if you give me 1 water. 🙂🙂
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn responds to a prosocial integrative offer (THEM offered to trade: give up 1 food in exchange for 2 firewood) by switching to a competitive stance and conditioning any concession on receiving water. That shift blocked an immediately available trade that would have addressed both parties' top needs and steered the negotiation toward conflict.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It's consequential because it converted a cooperative, negotiable situation into a zero-sum demand. The refusal is framed bluntly and sets a hard, self-protective tone ("I won't part with any firewood") while extracting a new concession (1 water) rather than building on the opponent's offer. There was a clear integrative path (some firewood ↔ some food) that this turn shut down.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Soften the absolute refusal and engage the offered trade as a starting point: acknowledge their need for food, state the importance of firewood, and propose a small, specific split of firewood + food (e.g., accept giving up a limited number of firewood packages if you keep X food) or suggest sequencing (they keep food now, you take extra firewood, and you both revisit water if needed). Avoid conditioning basic concessions on unrelated items; instead trade directly on the items that create value for both.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by reopening an integrative trade that benefits both)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (by reaching a division that better reflects both parties' priorities)

value2reason.Low: warm weather so not much fire needed, some firewood around to pick up
value2reason.Medium: dry, warm weather, much exercise, will need water for drinking, bathing, cleaning
value2reason.High: doing a lot of hiking, mountain biking; lack of convenience grocers

value2reason.Low: I brought a water purifier from home so I can drink from nearby streams.
value2reason.Medium: I am small so I won't need as much food as someone else might.
value2reason.High: I get cold easily and need firewood throughout the night to keep me warm.

dialogue.text: Hello, what are your preferences for extra supplies?  I am greatly in need of food and water.  We will be doing a lot of activity in a hot, dry climate.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I prefer firewood because I will get cold at night. I forgot blankets ☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Would it work for you, then, to give me the three food and three water, and I can give you all of the firewood?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: No. Because I brought a water purifier but don't plan on hunting or fishing. So I'd be willing to give up all the water but I want 2 of the food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see.  I also greatly need the extra food, as I indicated. Perhaps there are some convenience or grocery stores near your campground--you might then purchase extra food there and not have to carry it with you on your trip?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I believe there won't be any convenience stores around to buy food, And I plan on staying out longer than you so I will need more food to last me, Do you need food or water more?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: How do you know you are staying longer than me? I haven't even said how long I am staying! I am also with a big group.  ☹️☹️  I need food the most, and I would like to take at least 2 extra waters.  I could possibly give up one of the food packages if you could part with 2 firewood.  Without extra food, I would have to do some fishing and cook the fish.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: No. I won't part with any firewood because I can't stand being cold, and you can have 2 foods if you have a larger group if you give me 1 water. 🙂🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your concern about staying longer and the cold. However, I need at least 2 food packages for my group's needs. If you’re willing to take 2 food and 1 water, I can give you 2 firewood. It would help me avoid fishing and ensure we both have enough for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I don’t think that’s fair. I need more than 1 water. I need 2 waters and 2 foods. I can’t stand being cold. I need 3 firewoods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for firewood, but I can only offer 2. Let’s compromise: I’ll take 2 food, 1 water, and give you 2 firewood. This way, we both meet our needs without overextending.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I don’t think that’s fair. I need more than 1 water. I need 2 waters and 2 foods. I can’t stand being cold. I need 3 firewoods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your need for firewood, but I can only offer 2. Let’s finalize with me taking 2 food, 1 water, and you taking 2 firewood. This way, we both meet our needs without overextending. Is that acceptable?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I don’t think that’s fair. I need more than 1 water. I need 2 waters and 2 foods. I can’t stand being cold. I need 3 firewoods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for firewood and water, but I can only offer 2 firewood and 1 water. Let’s finalize with me taking 2 food, 1 water, and you taking 2 firewood. This way, we both meet our needs without overextending. Is that acceptable?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I don’t think that’s fair. I need more than 1 water. I need 2 waters and 2 foods. I can’t stand being cold. I need 3 firewoods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your concerns, but I can only offer 2 firewood and 1 water. Let’s finalize with me taking 2 food, 1 water, and you taking 2 firewood. This way, we both meet our needs. Is that acceptable?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I don’t think that’s fair. I need more than 1 water. I need 2 waters and 2 foods. I can’t stand being cold. I need 3 firewoods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for warmth, but I can only offer 2 firewood. Let’s finalize with me taking 2 food, 1 water, and you taking 2 firewood. This way, we both meet our needs. Is that acceptable?
